layout: Three filter row (Select scrape pool | PillsInput target health | Search) + collapse-all icon button, then a list of Mantine Accordion items (one per scrape pool).

filter_by_target_health.note: Different input variant than search — no visible border when empty, floats inside a wrapper

item_style.note: Green left-border when all targets UP; red when any DOWN. Rest of box has no border.

accordion.panel_table: Four columns: Endpoint (link) | Labels (row of pill-badges + chevron) | Last scrape (icon badge + duration badge) | State (UP/DOWN pill-badge)

label_key_value.note: Renders content like instance="..." job="demo" — with actual content in mixed case. NOTE: Some pill elements have no mantine-Badge class (cls: '') — possibly styled divs with identical visual tokens but different component; flag for inconsistency.

metadata_duration_badge.note: Root has textTransform:uppercase but inner Badge-label has textTransform:none — so visually the content is not uppercased. The inconsistency is between root-level and label-level textTransform on the SAME component.

state_down.note: Red palette; bg ~rgb(255,201,201), color ~rgb(201,42,42) (visible in screenshot, pushgateway row). Same 1000px pill shape, 11px/700.

status_indicator_circle: Green filled circle next to 'N / M up' when all up; red when any down. Visually a small ~16px circle SVG in the accordion header summary.

interactive_states_to_capture_in_phase_1.desc: Click chevron next to Labels to expand and show label name/value key-value pairs
Click PillsInput (Filter by target health) to open combobox dropdown
